title: Bloxd.io
description: An immersive multiplayer block-builder and action sandbox. Form alliances, construct massive fortresses, survive parkour towers, or engage in tactical BedWars, all inside a high-speed web arena.
instructions:
Use WASD keys to move and steer.
Use Spacebar to jump.
Use Left Click to mine/attack, or Right Click to build/place blocks.
Use Shift to run or sneak.
Numbers 1-9 to cycle your hotbar items.

title: Rally Racer Dirt
description: Rally Racer Dirt is a rally drift-based game that allows you to drift on both asphalt and dirt terrains while navigating through hills. This category is redefined with the introduction of Rally Racer Dirt, offering realistic and stunning controls. Enjoy drifty tuned physics, detailed graphics, 13 vehicles, 5 tuned tracks, challenge mode with 60 challenges, survival mode, and real-time multiplayer.
instructions:
Drive & Steer: WASD or Arrow Keys.
Handbrake & Drift: Spacebar.
Change Camera: C key.
Pause Game: P or Esc key.
Release WebGL: November 2023.
allow: accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; gamepad; fullscreen; keyboard-map;
sandbox: allow-forms allow-modals allow-orientation-lock allow-pointer-lock allow-presentation allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-downloads allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox
